# Titan Steel Structures

> Metal Building Calculator & Custom Steel Structures

## Company
- Name: Titan Steel Structures
- Phone: 1-888-807-6006
- Email: info@titansteelstructures.com
- Experience: 50+ years combined
- Customers: 1,500+ satisfied nationwide
- Coverage: All 50 US states

## Services
- Custom metal building design
- Interactive pricing calculator
- Agricultural buildings
- Commercial structures
- Residential barndominiums
- Equestrian facilities
- Aviation hangars
- Storage solutions
- Retail & office buildings

## Features
- 100% American-made steel
- 50-year structural warranty
- Custom dimensions & configurations
- Instant online quotes
- Roof styles: Gable, A-Frame, Single Slope
- Steel gauges: 14, 12, 10 gauge
- Nationwide delivery
